data.title: smoke-test-portable: tmp dir cleanup race -> 1 /tmp/lw-smoke-* dir remains after exit
data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-smoke-test-portable.sh Test 4 (test_smoke_test_cleanup) fails intermittently — expects 0 /tmp/lw-smoke-* dirs after script exits but finds 1 remaining. Likely a cleanup race condition where the trap fires before all subprocesses have fully exited their temp dirs.
